title: Ultra-Realistic Studio Portrait Prompt Generation
fullPrompt:
Create an ultra-realistic full-body studio portrait using the uploaded image as the identity reference. Preserve the person's exact facial features, face shape, hairstyle, skin tone, eye shape, body proportions, and overall identity with extremely high accuracy. The subject is looking directly at the camera with a calm and confident expression. OUTFIT:
Generate a premium monochromatic outfit in a single color chosen automatically to complement the person's appearance (examples: burgundy, black, beige, navy, olive, white, charcoal, emerald, cream, etc.). The outfit should consist of: - Oversized sweatshirt or hoodie - Matching jogger pants or tailored casual trousers - Clean white premium sneakers If the uploaded image already contains suitable clothing, recreate it in the same premium style while keeping the monochromatic look. BACKGROUND:
Minimal luxury studio background with a smooth dark grey gradient. Soft shadows on the floor. Clean premium editorial aesthetic with no distractions. TEXT ELEMENT: Place a large vertical stack of bold 3D white letters beside the subject. The text must read exactly: "{{YOUR_NAME}}" (each letter stacked vertically from top to bottom). Examples: MAURYA M A U R Y A The letters should be: - Huge - Thick 3D extruded typography - Matte white finish - Soft realistic shadows
Positioned on the right side of the subject - Extending almost from the floor to the top of the frame - Perfectly aligned vertically - Premium luxury branding style LIGHTING: Professional studio lighting with: - Large softbox key light - Gentle rim light - Soft fill light - Natural skin tones - High dynamic range - Cinematic contrast - Luxury fashion magazine quality CAMERA: 85mm portrait lens Eye-level camera angle f/2.8 aperture Sharp focus Natural perspective Photorealistic details QUALITY:
Ultra realistic Hyper detailed Editorial fashion photography Luxury studio aesthetic Extremely sharp face Realistic fabric texture Natural skin pores Accurate proportions Photorealistic shadows Premium color grading No watermark No logo No extra people No background clutter

title: Hyperrealistic Alice in Wonderland Prompt
fullPrompt:
Appearance, skin tone, eyes, and hair are strictly from the FaceID reference. A live person is in the shot, not a photo. The face conveys a state of extreme shock and confusion: wide-eyed, a stiff facial expression, and a mouth open in a silent scream. The skin texture is highly realistic, with subtle pores and a natural, wet sheen.

Action and Pose:
A dynamic fall into a deep, surreal hole. The girl is in a free-falling, upside-down state, her body flexed, creating the illusion of weightlessness. One hand is desperately extended toward the viewer (a highly cropped perspective), her fingers splayed, as if trying to grasp something. The other hand is thrown to the side. Her hair is blowing violently upward, creating a swirling effect.

Equipment and Materials:
A classic Victorian dress, tailored from real materials. The blue fabric is thick, matte cotton or fine linen with realistic folds and creases from the wind. The white apron and frills are made of thin, starched lace, with detailed embroidery and visible folds.  The black headband is made of heavy silk or velvet. The socks are striped—a thick knit with a distinct texture. The shoes are made of shiny leather, reflecting the shimmer of the surroundings.

Environment and Atmosphere:
The space inside a dark, infinite cylindrical hole is filled with a magical mist and floating objects. Surrounding the protagonist, in a chaotic swirl:
- An antique pocket watch with a gold chain and cracked glass, with detailed gears.
- A large wooden floor clock with a carved case made of dark wood.
- Playing cards made of thick, old paper, with gold stamping, scattered like a fan.
- A fresh red rose with velvety petals, dewdrops, and sharp thorns.
- Dust particles, flashes, and small particles float in the air, illuminated by a magical light from below.

Lighting and Camera:
Complex cinematic lighting. The main light source is below, inside the hole (bottom lighting), creating dramatic shadows on the face and highlighting the edges of clothing. Soft contrasting light (rim lighting) separates the figure from the dark background.

 Camera: Super wide-angle lens (14-24mm) to enhance the fall effect and perspective distortion. Top-down perspective (High angle), viewing the falling figure from behind. Depth of field focuses on the face, blurring foreground and background objects.

Style and quality:
Raw, hyperrealistic, 8K, film image, cinematic color grading (dark blue and deep red), detailed skin textures, pores, imperfections, motion blur on flying objects, volumetric light, Unreal Engine 5.2 render style, high dynamic range.

Format:
9:16

title: Golden fantasy portrait with butterflies
fullPrompt: Generate a high-quality, double exposure style portrait of a woman. The central figure is standing in a yellow embroidered sharara suit with a matching dupatta. Behind her, two larger, translucent side profiles of her face are visible, one on each side. She is wearing gold glasses and traditional jhumka earrings. Surround the scene with a magical atmosphere of glowing golden butterflies, soft clouds, and sparkling light particles

title: Cinematic Double Portrait Recreation
fullPrompt:
Use the uploaded image as the ONLY character/face reference.
STRICT IDENTITY LOCK: Do NOT change the uploaded character's face in any way. Preserve 100% exact facial identity, facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, hairline, eyebrows, eyes, nose, lips, ears, expression, age appearance, body proportions, and every unique facial detail. Do NOT beautify, reshape, smooth the skin, or modify facial proportions. Keep the character instantly recognizable.
Recreate the reference image exactly. Replace ONLY the character with the uploaded face while keeping everything else identical.
Scene & Composition: Create a premium cinematic double-portrait composite with the exact same layout as the reference.
A large close-up portrait of the character fills most of the background, occupying approximately 70–80% of the frame.
The background portrait is slightly turned toward the camera with a calm, confident expression.
The character wears black round sunglasses in the large portrait.
In front of the large portrait, place a full-body version of the same character standing confidently with both hands inside the trouser pockets.
Maintain the exact scale, positioning, spacing, and perspective between the large portrait and the full-body subject.
Wardrobe (Keep Same Style):
Oversized brown/coffee-colored linen shirt with sleeves rolled up.
Loose white wide-leg trousers.
White sneakers.
Minimal jewelry (optional).
Background (Keep Exactly Same):
Dark brown/black cinematic studio backdrop.
Warm golden rim light around the hair.
Soft spotlight illumination.
Wooden floor with realistic texture.
Dramatic editorial atmosphere.
Lighting: Warm golden backlight creating glowing hair edges, soft cinematic key light on the face, balanced shadows, realistic highlights, premium editorial color grading.
Camera: Vertical portrait (4:5), DSLR, 85mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, ultra-sharp facial details.
Quality: Ultra-realistic photography, 8K HDR, DSLR quality, photorealistic, masterpiece, highly detailed, natural skin texture, realistic fabric folds, Vogue-style editorial portrait.
IMPORTANT: Keep the background, wooden floor, lighting, double-exposure layout, large portrait placement, full-body placement, sunglasses on the large portrait, camera angle, framing, pose, perspective, colors, and overall composition exactly the same as the reference image. Replace ONLY the character with the uploaded face while maintaining perfect identity accuracy.
Negative Prompt: Different pose, different layout, different background, missing large portrait, incorrect placement, face modification, hairstyle change, beautified face, extra person, extra fingers, missing fingers, bad anatomy, deformed hands, unrealistic skin, blur, low quality, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, oversaturated colors, cropped face, duplicate body, incorrect proportions.

title: Luxury Fashion Collage Poster Generation
fullPrompt:
UNIVERSAL FASHION COLLAGE POSTER v1.0

Create a premium luxury editorial fashion collage from the uploaded portrait while preserving the subject's identity with maximum accuracy.

OUTPUT
• Aspect Ratio: 4:5
• Resolution: 4096×5120 Ultra HD
• Style: Luxury Editorial Fashion
• Camera: 85mm Portrait Lens
• Lighting: Soft Professional Studio Lighting
• Render: Photorealistic
• Color Profile: Natural Premium

IDENTITY PRESERVATION (Highest Priority)
Maintain 100% facial resemblance to the reference image.

Preserve:
• Face shape
• Jawline
• Forehead
• Eyes
• Eyebrows
• Nose
• Lips
• Skin tone
• Hair color
• Hair texture
• Hairline
• Natural facial proportions
• Realistic age
• Natural expression

Do NOT:
• Morph the face
• Beautify excessively
• Change facial structure
• Add artificial symmetry
• Drift from the original identity
• Add or remove facial features

COMPOSITION
Create a premium Instagram-style editorial collage.

Layout:
• Four large rounded-rectangle background portrait panels
• Equal white spacing between panels
• Background portraits rendered in Black & White
• Main subject positioned in front of the collage
• Main subject is the largest visual element
• Full body visible

BACKGROUND
• Minimal luxury studio
• Dark charcoal matte backdrop
• No distractions

POSES

Main Subject
• Three-quarter body angle
• Natural head position
• Looking slightly off-camera
• Calm, confident editorial expression
• Relaxed natural hand pose

Background Portraits
1. Hand near chin
2. Looking downward
3. Looking slightly left
4. Looking directly forward

WARDROBE

Automatically choose clothing based on gender unless custom clothing is specified.

Male
• Premium oversized shirt
• Tailored wide-leg trousers

Female
• Luxury relaxed shirt
• High-waisted wide-leg trousers

Fabric
• Cotton
• Linen
• Silk blend

Wrinkles should appear natural.

ACCESSORIES (Optional)
• Minimal watch
• Bracelet
• Necklace
• Earrings
• Black sunglasses (only if appropriate)

HAIR
• Preserve original hairstyle
• Preserve color
• Preserve texture
• Allow only subtle styling improvements
• Maintain natural volume

LIGHTING
• Large soft octabox key light
• Gentle fill light
• Soft white rim light
• Natural realistic shadows

CAMERA
• 85mm portrait lens
• f/2.8 aperture
• Face priority autofocus
• Medium depth of field

COLOR GRADING
• Main subject in full natural color
• Background portraits in black & white
• High contrast
• Luxury editorial grading
• Realistic skin tones

EDITING
• Light professional skin retouch
• Preserve natural skin texture
• High sharpness
• Wide dynamic range
• Zero visible noise
• Premium magazine-quality finish

NEGATIVE PROMPT

Low quality, blurry, pixelated, identity mismatch, face morphing, beauty filter, plastic skin, distorted face, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate body, incorrect anatomy, cropped head, cropped feet, overexposed, underexposed, artifacts, AI glitches, text, logos, watermarks, usernames, Instagram UI, borders, frames, captions, unrealistic pose, unnatural proportions.
